selections.name: Extremely Perfect
selections.reason: Strong form with a recent 2nd at Armidale. Top contender in this field.

selections.name: Go Russian
selections.reason: Comes off a solid 2nd at Newcastle and will appreciate the quick turnaround.

selections.name: Russian Words
selections.reason: Drops back to a country maiden and can improve significantly here.

selections.name: Daisy Duck
selections.reason: Market watch off a break for the new stable. Has shown glimpses of ability.

danger_horse.name: Mr Cornstar
danger_horse.reason: Fitter second-up and open to plenty of improvement.

selections.name: Twice Az Cool
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Scone last start. Only needs to hold that form to be the one to beat.

selections.name: Rock Emperor (NZ)
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and finished a solid 3rd. Plenty of improvement to come.

selections.name: Lobbyist
selections.reason: Consistent performer who sat on the speed and boxed on well for 3rd last time out.

selections.name: Envisioned
selections.reason: Can figure on best form and is worth an each-way ticket in this lineup.

danger_horse.name: Northfire
danger_horse.reason: Will need to improve from debut but has the potential to surprise.

selections.name: Northern Boogie
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and followed up with a solid 3rd. Rates as a clear top pick.

selections.name: Vierville
selections.reason: Drops in class here and should be right in the mix based on previous form.

selections.name: Redline
selections.reason: Won by a nose at Warialda last start and can carry that momentum forward.

selections.name: Golden Vader
selections.reason: Third-up today and has won third-up previously. Capable of sharp improvement.

danger_horse.name: Stiorra
danger_horse.reason: First-up and will be better for the run, but has the class to threaten.

selections.name: Don't Share Shamus
selections.reason: Sat on the speed and boxed on steadily for 2nd at Tuncurry. Shapes as a strong top-three chance.

selections.name: Zorko
selections.reason: Well-placed here after a decent 4th at Taree. Will come on from that run.

selections.name: Any Questions
selections.reason: Has claims on best form and a bold showing is on the cards despite the draw.

selections.name: Pressiaire
selections.reason: Worth another chance on an eight-day back-up after a fair 5th at Muswellbrook.

danger_horse.name: Luna Cruiser
danger_horse.reason: Second run back and is among the better hopes if she can overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Lord Of The Sun
selections.reason: Won nicely by 1.5 lengths at Armidale last start. In contention again from the inside alley.

selections.name: He's My Warrior
selections.reason: First-up winner at Tamworth. Back in great shape and well-placed to take this out.

selections.name: Sir Herridah
selections.reason: Won at Dubbo two back and profiles nicely. Can improve stepping back up in distance.

selections.name: My Angel Shell (NZ)
selections.reason: Will find this easier than recent assignments and is among the leading hopes.

danger_horse.name: Take The Jackpot
danger_horse.reason: Second-up and can improve on his first-up effort.

selections.name: Think Back
selections.reason: Going for a hat-trick after wins at Armidale and Muswellbrook. Progressing in great style.

selections.name: Big Short
selections.reason: Won by a nose at Tamworth last start. Can build on that performance.

selections.name: Zelestial (GB)
selections.reason: Has claims on best form and can improve sharply in this field.

selections.name: Zougo Boss
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who finished a solid 3rd at Armidale. Must be considered.

danger_horse.name: D'oro Choice
danger_horse.reason: Fitter third-up and is well placed to play a big role.

selections.name: Under The Collar
selections.reason: Won well by 2.25 lengths at Armidale. Heading the right way and cannot be discounted.

selections.name: Currumbin Alley
selections.reason: Resumes off a let-up. Scored a big win previously and is in the mix in this suitable contest.

selections.name: Bonoyster
selections.reason: Recent form is sound, including a solid 3rd at Scone. Racing well and this is his right trip.

selections.name: Imperial State
selections.reason: Resuming after a long break but has ability. Keep a close eye on the betting.

danger_horse.name: Kawatiri
danger_horse.reason: Dual acceptor who has been racing well recently. Looking to others but can threaten.
